  • Constructor Details

    • CareerTest

      public CareerTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • testDefaultConstructor

      public void testDefaultConstructor()
      Tests the default constructor. Verifies that sector is "Unemployed" and salary is 0.

    • testParameterizedConstructor

      public void testParameterizedConstructor()
      Tests the parameterized constructor. Verifies that sector and salary are set correctly.

    • testGetLevel

      public void testGetLevel()
      Tests the getLevel method. Ensures that initial level is 1 for both careers.

    • testGetBonus

      public void testGetBonus()
      Tests the getBonus method. Verifies bonus calculation based on salary and level.

    • testEarnXP

      public void testEarnXP()
      Tests the earnXP method. Verifies that earning XP increases level after reaching 100 XP.

    • testEarnXPModulo

      public void testEarnXPModulo()
      Tests earning XP with modulo operation. Ensures that level increases correctly when XP exceeds 100 multiple times.

    • testGetIncreasedSalaryAndBonusWithHigherLevel

      public void testGetIncreasedSalaryAndBonusWithHigherLevel()
      Tests salary and bonus increase with higher level. Verifies that leveling up increases salary and affects bonus calculation.

    • testGetSector

      public void testGetSector()
      Tests the getSector method. Ensures correct sector retrieval.

    • testGetSalary

      public void testGetSalary()
      Tests the getSalary method. Verifies correct salary retrieval.

    • testSetSector

      public void testSetSector()
      Tests the setSector method. Ensures that sector can be updated correctly.

    • testSetSalaryAndBonus

      public void testSetSalaryAndBonus()
      Tests the setSalary method and bonus recalculation. Verifies that salary can be updated and bonus recalculates correctly.

    • testBonusCalculationWithZeroSalary

      public void testBonusCalculationWithZeroSalary()
      Tests the getBonus method with zero salary. Ensures that bonus is zero when salary is zero, regardless of level.
